W_dk68.npy.source: Budapest connectome v3 (budapest_83.graphml), subgraph restricted to DK-68 regions, row-normalized

region_names.npy.description: Ordered list of 68 canonical DK-68 region names matching W_dk68 rows/cols
region_names.npy.source: Lausanne2008 label file + Budapest graphml node attributes

atrophy_AD.npy.description: 68-vector of regional atrophy for Alzheimer's disease (positive = more atrophy)
atrophy_AD.npy.source: ADNI UCSFFSX cortical thickness, DXSUM diagnosis labels, MMSE scores

atrophy_FTD.npy.description: 68-vector of regional atrophy for frontotemporal dementia/bvFTD (positive = more atrophy)
